'''Svan''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and villager on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Jomark/Legends|Jomark]]. He and [[Tarm]] became involved in a dispute over wage payment. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Joruus C'baoth]] sensed the disturbance from outside the house and arrived intending to mediate. Svan did not agree with C'baoth's decision, in favor of Tarm, and was prepared to fire his [[Slugthrower/Legends|slugthrower]]. C'baoth in turn blasted the man with [[The Force/Legends|Force]] [[Force lightning/Legends|lightning]], leaving Svan stunned on the ground and Skywalker shocked at the actions of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] he had come to learn from.
